title: Check If a String Contains All Binary Codes of Size K
titleCn: 检查一个字符串是否包含所有长度为 K 的二进制子串

testcases.input: s = "00110110", k = 2 Output: true Explanation: The binary codes of length 2 are "00", "01", "10" and "11". They can be all found as substrings at indices 0, 1, 3 and 2 respectively.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: The binary codes of length 2 are "00", "01", "10" and "11". They can be all found as substrings at indices 0, 1, 3 and 2 respectively.

testcases.input: s = "0110", k = 1 Output: true Explanation: The binary codes of length 1 are "0" and "1", it is clear that both exist as a substring.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: The binary codes of length 1 are "0" and "1", it is clear that both exist as a substring.

testcases.input: s = "0110", k = 2 Output: false Explanation: The binary code "00" is of length 2 and does not exist in the array.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: The binary code "00" is of length 2 and does not exist in the array.
